approvalSource: Steve explicitly required fixing the 108-card stacking failure and upgraded dual/parallel work lanes before the sprint proceeds.
scopeSummary: Enforce main session, worker branch/worktree, and review/integration lanes so completed work enters a serialized merge queue with post-merge verification and blocker handoff.
constraints: No parallel builders launched by this card.
Completed card or bundle work cannot sit outside main without merge queue entry or release-train record.
Do not allow hidden or untracked builders.
Do not weaken, skip, bypass, or demote verifier, ship, fanout, or backlog hygiene failures.
Do not run live extraction, provider probes, auth-required or paid jobs, Drive mutation, sends, or external writes.
